## Description

A fixture source note standing in for a real academic paper citation. Used to
exercise the vault serializer's parsing of SOURCE-prefixed notes with a full
citation block.

## Citation

Example, A. (2026) "A Fixture Paper About Fixtures." Journal of Fixtures, 1-10.
